heading: Liability for payment
label: 2002 Liability for payment
text: The tax imposed by this chapter shall be paid by the executor.
notes: Amendments1989— substituted “The” for “Except as provided in section 2210, the”.Pub. L. 101–2391984— inserted exception phrase.Pub. L. 98–369
